mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_waste_compliance ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_waste_compliance WHERE regulation_name LIKE '%' + #{regulationName} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_waste_compliance WHERE regulation_name LIKE '%' + #{regulationName} + '%'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_waste_compliance WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_waste_compliance (check_date, regulation_name, check_item, status, violation_details, corrective_action, action_deadline, responsible_person, action_status, reg_user, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{checkDate}, #{regulationName}, #{checkItem}, #{status}, #{violationDetails}, #{correctiveAction}, #{actionDeadline}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{actionStatus}, #{regUser}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_waste_compliance SET check_date = #{checkDate}, regulation_name = #{regulationName}, check_item = #{checkItem}, status = #{status}, violation_details = #{violationDetails}, corrective_action = #{correctiveAction}, action_deadline = #{actionDeadline}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, action_status = #{actionStatus}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
